baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-sensitive: when a negative GMI delta is applied this year, roll d6 — on 1–3, apply that negative delta a second time. Finance amplifies downturns asymmetrically. Booms are normal; depressions are existential.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, choose one other asset you own. That asset's loan repayment roll triggers only on a 1 (instead of its printed trigger range) until you sell either FINANCE card. Capital access reduces covenant pressure across the portfolio.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Land-backed investment funds command preferential lending terms from institutional counterparties.

flavourText: The fund doesn't produce anything. That's the point.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-sensitive: when a negative GMI delta is applied this year, roll d6 — on 1–3, apply that negative delta a second time. Regional banks survive most recessions but collapse in depressions.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE UPSTREAM asset, choose one other asset you own. That asset's loan repayment roll triggers only on a 1 (instead of its printed trigger range). Capital markets backing converts a regional bank into a preferred lender.
If you also own a FINANCE DOWNSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Retail deposit flows allow internal income reclassification — a standard banking tax structure.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Commercial mortgage origination is a bank's most reliable revenue stream — lenders reward the combination.

flavourText: Every loan on the books is someone else's problem. Eventually.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-sensitive: when a negative GMI delta is applied this year, roll d6 — on 1–3, apply that negative delta a second time. Consumer credit books deteriorate rapidly in downturns — defaults cascade.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, once per year you may move any number of loan tokens between this asset and any one other owned asset at no cost. Retail deposit funding from the bank reduces wholesale borrowing costs.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY DOWNSTREAM asset, add +1 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. Fintech distribution channels expand the consumer credit book faster than traditional branch networks.

flavourText: 23% APR. No annual fee. Unlimited regret.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-sensitive: when a negative GMI delta is applied this year, roll d6 — on 1–3, apply that negative delta a second time. Capital markets are the first to fall and the first to recover — volatility is the product.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, choose one other asset you own. That asset's loan repayment roll triggers only on a 1 (instead of its printed trigger range). Access to institutional lending desks transforms your portfolio's debt service profile.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. Quantitative trading platforms and enterprise software create compounding valuation loops in the eyes of growth-oriented lenders.

flavourText: Liquidity is a function of confidence. Confidence is a function of liquidity.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-sensitive: when a negative GMI delta is applied this year, roll d6 — on 1–3, apply that negative delta a second time. Institutional banks are too big to fail slowly — systemic exposure means losses compound across the portfolio.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE UPSTREAM asset, choose one other asset you own. That asset's loan repayment roll triggers only on a 1 (instead of its printed trigger range). Capital markets access funds the bank's own balance sheet at preferential rates.

If you also own a FINANCE DOWNSTREAM asset, once per year you may move any number of loan tokens between any two assets you own at no cost, regardless of their current capacity. Full vertical stack enables internal treasury operations — debt is just inventory.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own an ENERGY MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. Infrastructure debt is the preferred asset class of institutional lenders — a pipeline on the books improves the bank's own credit rating.

flavourText: We don't take risks. We price them.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-sensitive: when a negative GMI delta is applied this year, roll d6 — on 1–3, apply that negative delta a second time. AUM-based revenue dries up fast when markets fall — clients redeem, fees collapse.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, once per year you may move any number of loan tokens between any two assets you own at no cost, regardless of their current capacity. Institutional custody relationships give you full discretion over your own collateral.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE DOWNSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Residential REIT structures allow asset management fees to be reclassified as property management income — a standard institutional tax wrapper.

flavourText: 2 and 20. Every year. Rain or shine.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-sensitive: when a negative GMI delta is applied this year, roll d6 — on 1–4 (not 1–3), apply that negative delta a second time. Sovereign-scale capital is the most correlated asset in the game to macro conditions. All capital is recycled — income is zero by design.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, once per year you may move any number of loan tokens between any two assets you own at no cost regardless of capacity, AND choose one other owned asset — that asset's loan repayment roll triggers only on a 1 this year. Sovereign capital backing transforms your entire portfolio's debt profile.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own an ENERGY UPSTREAM asset, the depression double-application mechanic on this asset is reduced: roll d6 on negative GMI years — on 1–2 (not 1–4) does the delta apply a second time. Commodity-backed sovereign funds are structurally hedged against pure financial market contagion.

flavourText: The fund has no clients. The fund has no employees. The fund has no mercy.
